notes: Slide-29 rung 3: SMOOTHED subject mean only. p_smoothed = 0.9 * subject_mean_acc[name] + 0.1 * global_mean, fallback to global mean for unseen subjects, clipped to [0.001, 0.999] per slide 28. NO item text, NO benchmark adjustment, NO MLP. Slide 30 explicitly names this rung 'SMOOTHED subject mean' (not raw); 2 of 745 known subjects have subject_mean = 0.0 (DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp-Thinking, gemini-2.5-flash) and would NLL-explode under raw lookup if they appear in the leaderboard sample with y=1. Contrast vs const_glob_mean (rung 2) isolates how much per-subject signal is worth at cold-start.
